name: Calix Cloud & Access Platform API
what_it_does: Calix Cloud and Access Platforms REST API for broadband service provider network management, subscriber experience management, and revenue edge services. Enables AI agents to manage subscriber provisioning and service activation for broadband service automation, handle ONT and CPE device management for access network operations, access Revenue EDGE service creation and management for managed service delivery, retrieve network performance monitoring and quality metrics for ISP operations management, manage Wi-Fi experience management and home network support for subscriber experience, handle subscriber analytics and churn prediction for revenue management, access AXOS platform configuration for broadband access network automation, retrieve troubleshooting and support workflow for subscriber support automation, manage marketing analytics and subscriber engagement for managed service upsell, and integrate Calix with BSS/OSS, billing, and network management platforms.
use_cases: Automating subscriber provisioning from ISP operations agents
Managing Wi-Fi quality from subscriber experience agents
Delivering managed services from revenue edge agents
Monitoring network performance from NOC automation agents
not_for: Cable (DOCSIS) or cellular networks without fiber/DSL access
Enterprise networking without broadband service provider context
Large Tier 1 carriers without community broadband focus
best_when: A rural electric cooperative, independent telephone company, or community broadband provider using Calix wants AI agents to automate subscriber provisioning, service management, Wi-Fi support, and managed service delivery.
avoid_when: CRITICAL INFRASTRUCTURE RISK: Calix manages broadband access network infrastructure — automated ONT provisioning or device configuration errors can disrupt service to subscribers; changes require validation and rollback capability. FCC broadband regulations — automated subscriber data and network usage data must comply with FCC CPNI (Customer Proprietary Network Information) rules; unauthorized use of CPNI for marketing or data sharing creates FCC enforcement risk. E-Rate/BEAD compliance — community broadband providers receiving federal funding (E-Rate, BEAD program) have specific network management and nondiscrimination requirements; automated traffic management must comply with FCC Open Internet rules.

auth.notes: Calix uses OAuth 2.0. Developer portal at developer.calix.com. Webhooks for network and subscriber events. REST API with JSON. San Jose, California HQ. Founded 1999 by Carl Russo. Public (CALX NYSE). Calix Cloud is the SaaS platform for broadband service providers. 1,700+ broadband service provider customers (primarily rural telcos and electric coops). Competes with Adtran, Nokia, and Ciena for access network platforms.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual BSP subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per subscriber or per ONT; Calix Cloud platform fee
pricing.notes: San Jose, CA. Founded 1999. Public (CALX NYSE). 1,700+ broadband service providers. Rural telco and electric coop focus. Competes with Adtran and Nokia for access network.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: NETWORK INFRASTRUCTURE RISK: Automated ONT provisioning or device configuration errors disrupt subscriber broadband service; changes must be validated in staging environment and have rollback capability before production execution

FCC CPNI rules — automated use of subscriber network usage data (CPNI) for marketing or data sharing requires FCC-compliant CPNI opt-in consent; unauthorized CPNI use creates FCC enforcement risk and per-day fines

FCC Open Internet compliance — automated network traffic management must comply with FCC Open Internet rules (net neutrality); automated traffic throttling or prioritization without disclosure violates net neutrality requirements for BEAD-funded networks

E-Rate and BEAD funding compliance — broadband providers receiving federal E-Rate or BEAD funding have network management and reporting requirements; automated network changes must comply with federal funding program requirements
ONT firmware OTA risk — automated ONT firmware updates via OTA can brick devices if update fails; implement staged rollout with rollback capability for any automated firmware deployment

Rural customer demographics — Calix serves rural communities including elderly subscribers; automated subscriber communications must be accessible (plain language, multiple formats) for rural demographic
agent_readiness.security_notes: Broadband access network. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US. Subscriber network and CPNI data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Broadband network management. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US. Subscriber and network data.
